capabilities: Combine error detection mechanisms with security protocols to enhance agent reliability and security.

procedure.action: Compose error detection logs with security alerts using a centralized logging system like ELK Stack by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.
Initialize Prometheus to track error rates and trigger alerts when error count exceeds 5% of total requests in a 10-minute window.
Invoke AWS CloudWatch to set up anomaly detection on security-related metrics, alerting on deviations beyond 3 standard deviations.

Release a Circuit Breaker pattern to automatically halt operations when error thresholds are breached, preventing cascading failures using blue-green deployment strategy; run smoke_test() against new instance before switching traffic; assert smoke_test_pass_rate >= 1.0 before promoting.

Invoke a Retry with Backoff strategy for transient errors, using exponential backoff with jitter to reduce retry storms following the specified pattern; write a unit test covering the primary code path; assert test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete.

summary: Implement a robust error recovery strategy for agents by integrating error detection with security knowledge, ensuring reliable and secure operations.
title: Agent Error Recovery Strategy

failureConditions: Increased downtime due to unhandled errors.

Security vulnerabilities exposed by unmonitored error patterns; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.

System overload from retry storms without backoff; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
test_coverage >= 0.8 for the modified module before marking complete
successConditions: Verify error logs are correlated with security alerts in the monitoring dashboard
Test alerting system by simulating error spikes and confirming alert triggers
Check that Circuit Breaker engages when error rate exceeds defined threshold
